description_long: This is a plush stuffed bear with a distinctive purple patterned fabric covering most of its body, featuring a geometric design interwoven with gold and red accents. The bear has a round, friendly face with large, shiny black button eyes and a small, black snout. Its ears are rounded and covered in the same purple patterned fabric, while the snout, belly, and the bottoms of its feet are made from a contrasting brown, textured material that mimics fur. The bear's arms and legs are short and slightly outstretched, giving it a welcoming, huggable appearance. The stitching is visible along the seams, adding to its handcrafted look. This toy would likely be found in urban parks, playgrounds, or on neighborhood sidewalks as a lost or cherished item.
description: A plush, purple-patterned stuffed bear with brown textured accents, shiny black button eyes, and a soft, huggable form. Its arms and legs are outstretched, and it features visible stitching and a friendly face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, button eyes, brown snout, and belly patch, with both arms and legs visible and outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, showing the protruding snout, rounded ear, and the curve of its back and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the bear's head, body, and arms, all covered in the purple patterned fabric with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bear's profile, snout, ear, and the side of its limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round black button eyes and a small, simple snout. There is no visible mouth, giving it a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms and legs slightly outstretched, head facing forward.
